svg.text: Each hexagram connected to 6 neighbors (single-line flip). Every edge crosses a zone boundary. 100% cross-zone.
192 edges, ALL cross zone boundaries. Flipping any bit changes the digital root (powers of 2 are never multiples of 9).
The Changing Lines Network is a 6D hypercube. Each hexagram is a vertex. Edges = single-line transformations. No internal zone transitions exist.
